creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to cos from comment #16)
So, this procstat trace is from the system after it hanged?  I don't see any obvious culprits there.

(In reply to cos from comment #18)
Is this workaround completely reliable?  Have you been able to suspend/resume, say, 10 times in a row after disabling XDM?  The xdm process in the procstat output I linked above isn't doing anything abnormal, so that's a bit odd.
